pattern: Simulate the 3x3 board: assign player marks by move index parity, then check all eight winning lines (3 rows, 3 columns, 2 diagonals). If no winner, decide Draw vs Pending by move count.
hints: Player A takes move indices 0, 2, 4, … and player B takes 1, 3, 5, … — parity tells you whose turn it is without tracking a separate variable.
After all moves are placed, check each of the eight lines (3 rows, 3 columns, 2 diagonals) to see if any player owns all three cells.
If no winner: 9 moves exhausted means Draw, fewer than 9 means Pending.

edge_inputs.description: only one move played so far
all 9 cells filled with no winner, Draw
game ends on the 9th move with B winning
Pending after 4 moves with no clear winner path

stress.description: exhaustive random games up to 9 moves; covers all outcome branches
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    cells = [[r, c] for r in range(3) for c in range(3)]
    rng.shuffle(cells)
    n = rng.randint(1, 9)
    return [cells[:n]]
